pattern: There are only two alternating targets; count mismatches against one, the other is the complement.
hints: An alternating string of a given length is fully determined once you fix its first character, so there are exactly two candidates.
Count how many positions differ from the pattern starting with '0' (even indices '0', odd indices '1').
Mismatches against the other pattern equal the length minus that count; return the smaller of the two.

edge_inputs.description: worst case requires flipping every other
